nodes.name: 整理插入数据（更新打印模板）

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    p.printinfo_id,
    p.print_name,
    p.print_quantity,
    p.createtime,
    u.user_name,
    m.product_model_name,
    p.product_model_id,
    p.printinfo_type,
    p.print_version
FROM 
    mes.printinfo p
JOIN 
    mes.user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id
JOIN 
    mes.product_model m ON p.product_model_id = m.product_model_id
where p.status = 1
